description:
<!--
There's no good pixar disney looking cartoon model yet so i decided to make one. This is a merge of Pixar Style Model with my own Loras to create a generic 3d looking western cartoon. In the examples I Use hires. fix, upscale latent, denoising 0.5, hires steps 20, upscale by 2 . Clip skip 2 . I will upload more variants of this in the future



You need to use VAE or the color become pale and gray



if you like the models, please consider supporting me on, i will continue to upload more cool stuffs in the future


https://www.patreon.com/PromptSharingSamaritan


https://ko-fi.com/promptsharingsamaritan
-->
